mapper.sql: SELECT d.device_id, d.device_code, d.device_name, d.device_type, d.protocol, d.manufacturer_id, d.tenant_id, d.status, d.firmware_version, d.bluetooth_name, d.service_uuid, d.notify_char_uuid, d.last_seen_at, d.metadata, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, m.manufacturer_name FROM iot_device d LEFT JOIN iot_manufacturer m ON d.manufacturer_id = m.manufacturer_id
mapper.select: WHERE d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND d.del_flag = '0'
WHERE d.device_code = #{deviceCode} AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device ( device_code, device_name, device_type, protocol, manufacturer_id, tenant_id, status, firmware_version, bluetooth_name, service_uuid, notify_char_uuid, metadata, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceType}, #{protocol}, #{manufacturerId}, #{tenantId}, #{status}, #{firmwareVersion}, #{bluetoothName}, #{serviceUuid}, #{notifyCharUuid}, #{metadata}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device SET status = #{status} WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
UPDATE iot_device SET last_seen_at = NOW() WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE iot_device SET del_flag = '2' WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iot_device WHERE manufacturer_id = #{manufacturerId} AND del_flag = '0'
